messages.content:
Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

Script injection in iOSWeb in Google Chrome on iOS prior to 84.0.4147.105 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTML page.

A script injection vulnerability was identified in the iOSWeb component of Google Chrome on iOS versions prior to 84.0.4147.105. This flaw allowed remote attackers to execute arbitrary code through a specially crafted HTML page.
